mapper.select: SELECT id, template_code, template_name, template_category, description, scope_level, status, latest_version_no, published_version_no, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_template ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, template_code, template_name, template_category, description, scope_level, status, latest_version_no, published_version_no, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_template WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, template_code, template_name, template_category, description, scope_level, status, latest_version_no, published_version_no, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_template ( template_code, template_name, template_category, description, scope_level, status, latest_version_no, published_version_no, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{templateCategory}, #{description}, #{scopeLevel}, #{status}, #{latestVersionNo}, #{publishedVersionNo}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, template_category = #{templateCategory}, description = #{description}, scope_level = #{scopeLevel}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_template SET latest_version_no = #{latestVersionNo}, published_version_no = #{publishedVersionNo}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
